details: Table 2 of Dearden 2003 lists Methyl acetate with b.p. (exp.) 57.0 — matches CSV; experimental column labeled 'exp.' so 'measured' is correct.
Compound 5a (1-Benzoyl-4-(4-chlorophenyl)-2-oxo-1,2,5,10-tetrahydrobenzo[g]quinoline-3-carbonitrile) is reported with 'MP > 300 °C' in the experimental section; quote and relation '>' match.

Compound 14 (6,6,9-Trimethyl-2-[2-(4-nitrophenyl)hydrazineylidene]-3-pentyl-2,6,6a,7,8,9,10,10a-octahydro-1H-benzo[c]chromen-1-one) reported as orange solid with mp 46–49 °C; range midpoint 47.5 matches.
Amodiaquine dihydrochloride dihydrate (compound 3) has mp = 159–166 °C in Experimental Section; midpoint 162.5 matches.
Compound 4f in Rubstov 2019 PARP paper, Ethyl (E)-1-(3,3-dimethyl-2-oxobutylidene)-2,5-dioxo... carboxylate, m.p. 223-224 °C; midpoint 223.5 matches.

Property is labeled DSC_onset, but the paper explicitly describes 194.2 °C as the TGA-measured onset of decomposition ('onset of decomposition at a temperature of 194.2 °C'). Table 2's T_onset column is the decomposition onset (TGA), not a DSC onset; should be 'decomposition'.
Section 4.1.7 compound 10 (1-(2,4-Difluorophenyl)-2-(1H-1,2,4-triazol-1-yl)ethanol) m.p. 119–121 °C; midpoint 120 matches.
Compound 5b (2-(4-Fluorophenyl)-4-isopropyl-4,10-dihydro-1H[1,2,4]triazino[6,1-b]-quinazolin-10-one) m.p. 180°C; matches CSV.
Table 2 of khan_2017 piroxicam cocrystal shows Piroxicam-saccharine sodium 1:1 cocrystal melting point 181-183 °C; midpoint 182 matches.
Compound 5h (5-Methyl-2-phenyl-4-((1-((1-(o-tolyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-4-yl)methyl)-1H-indol-3-yl)methylene)-2,4-dihydro-3H-pyrazol-3-one) mp 220–222 °C; midpoint 221 matches.
Compound 11b (1,2-Bis(8-(4-(2-(5'-(methylthio)-2,2'-bithiophen-5-ylthio)ethyl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-1-yl)octyl)disulfide) mp 118-120 °C in PDF; midpoint 119 matches.
Compound 5 (6-Phenylamino-4-benzalaminothieno[3,2-d]pyrimidin-7-carbonitrile) recrystallized from pyridine as white crystals, m.p. 243 °C; matches CSV.
Stigmasterol (6) reported with m.p. 155-156 °C in spectral data; midpoint 155.5 matches.

Table 1 lists imidoyl azide with Y=4-MeO (compound 4), structure (4-MeO-Ph-O-C=N-Z)-N3 with Z = p-toluenesulfonyl, 'Azide dec. temp. (°C)' = 77; property 'decomposition' is correct, compound name in CSV identifies same compound.
Compound 1f (2-(4-([1,1'-Biphenyl]-4-yl)-1H-1,2,3-triazol-1-yl)-N-(2-(3-methoxyphenoxy)phenyl)acetamide) White crystals, m.p. 156–158 °C; midpoint 157 matches.
Compound 7 (4-Acetyl-4'-acetylsemicarbazone diphenyl sulphide) m.p 190-191 °C, yield 85%; midpoint 190.5 matches.
Compound 5c (2-(4-Cyclohexylbenzenesulfonyl)-1,3,5-trimethylbenzene) obtained as white solid mp 102-103 °C; midpoint 102.5 matches.
Compound 4c (3,3'-(Ethane-1,2-diyl)bis(1-(2-(hexadecyloxy)-2-oxoethyl)-1H-imidazol-3-ium) bromide) off-white solid m.p. = 128–130 °C, yield 67%; midpoint 129 matches.
Brown 2000 Table 1 'Melting Points of Structural Isomers' (mp/K) lists p-dichlorobenzene 325.9; conversion 325.9-273.15 = 52.75 °C correct.
Table 1 (diacetoxyiodoarenes, melting points uncorrected) lists R = 3-OMe with Mp (°C) 133-35 (= 133-135); name 1-(Diacetoxyiodo)-3-methoxybenzene matches structure.
Section 3.3 of bock_2024 cardarine_polymorphs PDF states 'polymorph GW-3 shows a melting point of 139 °C'; matches CSV.
Compound 4l ((1SR) N-(1-(N-tert-Butylcarbamoyl)-1-(4-(dimethylamino)pyridyn-3-yl)methyl) O-benzyl L-serine methyl ester) colorless solid, mp 145 °C (mixture of two diastereomers); matches.
Compound 35 (Cis-2,6-dimethyl-N-(morpholino)methylenebisphosphonic acid) obtained 59% yield; mp. 222 °C; matches CSV.

Table 5 'Estimated properties... STRM/SIRM' lists Baricitinib Tb [K] SIRM = 760.077; conversion 760.077-273.15 = 486.927 °C correct; meas_calc 'calculated' is correct (SIRM is regression model output).

Compound 5a (N,N-bis-[(3,5-dimethyl-4-iodo-1H-pyrazol-1-yl)-methyl]-4-fluoroaniline) yield 91%, mp 82–85 °C; midpoint 83.5 matches. (Paper has minor typo 'dimetyl' but CSV name uses correct 'dimethyl'.)
